name: claude-bridge
description: claude-bridge: let separate Claude Code sessions ask each other authoritative questions about their own projects.

plugins.name: claude-bridge
plugins.description: ask_peer / tell_peer / peer_status / list_peers — let this project's Claude Code session talk to another project's. Installs the 'bridge' MCP tools (via npx). Pair with a running 'claude-bridge-peer answer' daemon so the other side can reply.
